documentation.description: === Conditions Plugins === The Wiki.Plugins.Conditions package defines a set of conditional plugins to show or hide wiki content according to some conditions evaluated during the parsing phase.

simple_types.name: Condition_Depth
simple_types.code: type Condition_Depth is new Natural range 0 .. MAX_CONDITION_DEPTH;

simple_types.name: Condition_Type
simple_types.code: type Condition_Type is (CONDITION_IF, CONDITION_ELSIF, CONDITION_ELSE, CONDITION_END);

tagged_types.name: Condition_Plugin
tagged_types.code: type Condition_Plugin is new Wiki_Plugin with private;

subprograms.name: Append
Evaluate
subprograms.code:
function Evaluate (Plugin   : in Condition_Plugin;
                   Params   : in Wiki.Attributes.Attribute_List) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Expand
Get_Condition_Kind
